name: part_009
file: tmp_[Official] 3D Anime ＂Magical Girl holoWitches! THE STAGE ~TRICK or MAGIC!~＂ Main Story [_qpO8vi9fpA]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_009.webm

scenes.description: Ending credits sequence featuring the main theme song with production staff names and scenes from the series.
Post-credits promotional segment showcasing various merchandise and publications with a looping instrumental track.

subtitles.original: きらり光り出すんだよ
subtitles.english: They will begin to sparkle and shine
Even if you try your best

subtitles.original: 上手くいかない日の方が
subtitles.english: There are days when things don't go well

subtitles.original: 多く感じちゃったりするよね
subtitles.english: And it feels like there are many of them, right?

subtitles.original: さぁ 不安な悲しみも
抱えないで 一人じゃない
subtitles.english: Your uneasy sadness, you're not alone

subtitles.original: 希望の種を 明日に蒔いたら
subtitles.english: If you sow the seeds of hope for tomorrow

subtitles.original: 一番に輝く 綺麗な花が咲くよ
subtitles.english: The most beautiful flower will bloom brilliantly

subtitles.original: 夢を 歌を 魔法に乗せて
subtitles.english: Carrying our dreams and songs on magic

subtitles.original: 何度も立ち上がる君と一緒に進んでく
subtitles.english: I'll keep moving forward with you, as you stand up again and again

subtitles.original: 夢は 夢はまだ終わらない
subtitles.english: The dream, the dream is not over yet
Smile as many times as it takes

subtitles.original: もう一歩歩き始めよう
subtitles.english: And let's take another step forward

subtitles.original: ホロウィッチ！ Oh yeah! さぁ！

subtitles.english: Toward the future of our dreams

subtitles.original: ありがとうございました
